creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Kay,

patching of the new version of the varkon port fails:

===>  Extracting for varkon-1.18A
=> MD5 Checksum OK for varkon/varkon_sources_1.18A.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for varkon/varkon_sources_1.18A.tar.gz.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for varkon/v_man.zip.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for varkon/v_man.zip.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for varkon/m_man.zip.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for varkon/m_man.zip.
===>  Patching for varkon-1.18A
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for varkon-1.18A
1 out of 7 hunks failed--saving rejects to ../com/english/varkon.rej
=> Patch patch--com+english+varkon failed to apply cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /home/stefan/ports/varkon.

Regards,
Stefan
